xpath.attribute: ( production_state in ('draft', 'done') or working_state == 'blocked' or not is_user_working or (quality_state == 'none' and test_type not in ['register_consumed_materials', 'register_byproducts', 'instructions']) )

button.name: button_finish
button.title: Done
button.invisible: ( production_state in ('draft', 'done') or working_state == 'blocked' or not is_user_working or quality_state != 'none' or test_type in ['register_consumed_materials', 'register_byproducts', 'instructions'] )
